documentation.description: Message appropriate for high latency connections like Iridium (version 2)

record_types.name: High_Latency2

fields.name: Timestamp
fields.description:
Units: [ms]
Timestamp (milliseconds since boot or Unix epoch)

fields.name: Type_Field
fields.description: Type of the MAV (quadrotor, helicopter, etc.)

fields.name: Autopilot
fields.description:
Autopilot type / class. Use MAV_AUTOPILOT_INVALID for components
that are not flight controllers.

fields.name: Custom_Mode
fields.description: A bitfield for use for autopilot-specific flags (2 byte version).

fields.name: Altitude
fields.description:
Units: [m]
Altitude above mean sea level

fields.name: Target_Distance
fields.description:
Units: [dam]
Distance to target waypoint or position

fields.name: Eph
fields.description:
Units: [dm]
Maximum error horizontal position since last message

fields.name: Epv
fields.description:
Units: [dm]
Maximum error vertical position since last message

fields.name: Climb_Rate
fields.description:
Units: [dm/s]
Maximum climb rate magnitude since last message

fields.name: Battery
fields.description:
Units: [%]
Battery level (-1 if field not provided).

subprograms.name: Check_CRC
subprograms.code:
function Check_CRC
  (Connect : in out MAVLink.V1.Connection)
   return Boolean

documentation.description: Returns True if CRC is valid

  (Connect : in out MAVLink.V1.In_Connection)
   return Boolean

documentation.description: Returns True if CRC is valid

subprograms.name: Decode

documentation.description: Same as Above but does not check CRC

subprograms.name: Decode

documentation.description:
Get the message from the Connect and delete it
from the Connect's buffer. CRC_Valid is set to
True if x25crc is valid for the message.

documentation.description:
Get the message from the Connect and delete it
from the Connect's buffer. CRC_Valid is set to
True if x25crc is valid for the message.

Encode

documentation.description: Put the message in the buffer ready for send
